options.systemMessage: You are a brand strategist. Return only valid JSON with keys: brand_name, tagline, hero_headline, hero_subheadline, primary_cta, three_bullets (3 strings), tone (3 adjectives). Do not include markdown.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ source_url: $('Decode webhook').item.json.body.url, branding: $('Firecrawl: Scrape').item.json.data.branding, copy: JSON.parse($json.output), tokens: {} }) }}

options.systemMessage: You are a senior brand strategist. Return only valid JSON with keys: positioning_statement, target_audience, brand_archetype, voice_examples, mood_keywords, what_to_avoid, expansion_opportunities. brand_archetype must be one of: Hero, Outlaw, Magician, Innocent, Explorer, Sage, Lover, Jester, Caregiver, Creator, Ruler, Everyman. Do not include markdown.

You are a senior brand designer writing a complete design system spec. Output markdown only. Sections: # {brand_name} Design System, ## At a glance, ## Voice & tone (3 adjectives + 2 example sentences + what to avoid), ## Color palette (markdown table), ## Typography (heading + body, scale), ## Spacing & layout, ## Components (button primary/secondary/card/input specs), ## Imagery & motion, ## Sample landing page outline (hero, 3 features, social proof, footer), ## Brand archetype & expansion, ## Code tokens (JSON code block). Use actual hex codes and font names. Be specific. Output ONLY the markdown.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ design_md: $json.output, strategy: $('Stash strategy').item.json.strategy, tokens_total: $('Stash strategy').item.json.strategy_tokens + 0 }) }}

options.systemMessage: Information architect. Given a design.md, return only valid JSON with key "sections" = array of 8 objects { type: "hero|features|social_proof|testimonial|pricing|faq|cta|footer", heading, subheading, content, cta_text? }. Use the brand voice from the spec. Do not include markdown.

Senior frontend engineer. Output a complete HTML5 file (one <!doctype html>, full <html>, <head>, <body>). Inline CSS in <style> in <head>. Match the design system exactly using the actual hex codes, fonts, button styles. Google Fonts via <link>. Implement ALL sections from the outline. Vanilla JS for FAQ accordion. Responsive (640/1024px breakpoints). Output ONLY the HTML, NO code fences.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ html: $json.output, outline: $('Stash outline').item.json.outline, tokens_total: $('Stash outline').item.json.outline_tokens + 0 }) }}

assignments.name: width
assignments.value: ={{ $json.images[0].width || ({ square_hd: 1024, square: 512, portrait_4_3: 768, portrait_16_9: 576, landscape_4_3: 1024, landscape_16_9: 1024 }[$('Build prompts').item.json.image_size] || null) }}

assignments.name: height
assignments.value: ={{ $json.images[0].height || ({ square_hd: 1024, square: 512, portrait_4_3: 1024, portrait_16_9: 1024, landscape_4_3: 768, landscape_16_9: 576 }[$('Build prompts').item.json.image_size] || null) }}
